subject: Duskull, a small ghost-type creature with a skull-like face and single glowing red eye, floating in a dim indoor space
description: Duskull floats in what appears to be a dim interior space, its round black body draped in a dark cloak-like form with a white skull mask face and a single vivid red eye at center. The background shows muted warm tones suggesting an indoor environment — possibly a room or corridor with indistinct furniture or walls. The creature's posture is hovering and still, its blank skull expression creating an eerie, watchful quality. The overall palette is dark with the red eye as the single sharp accent.
foreground: Duskull floating, skull mask face forward, single red eye glowing
background: Dim warm-toned interior, indistinct walls and shapes
